DEPT #5, JUDGE DESMOND, CLERK GMCGREW, CSR PDOWLING 2:58PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. TERMS AND CONDITIONS: JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION. PLFT TO PAY DEFTS $200.00 ON OR BEFORE AUG. 1, 1995 THRU COUNSEL. RENTS AND DAMAGES WAIVED. DEFTS TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 11:59PM AUG 31, 1995. EACH SIDES BEAR ON COSTS AND ATTY FEES EXCEPT IF JUDGMENT HAS TO BE ENFORCED. PLFT. THEN TO FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFT NOT VACATE THEN WITH 24 HRS NOTICE PLFT ON EX PARTE MAY HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED. DEFTS TO DISMISS CLAIM AGAINST PLFT WITH RENT BOARD. PLFT TO PREPARE STIPULATION/JUDGMENT.
